name: EO convention rules ground in the imported EO catalog even with empty arch and engineering catalogs
command:
printf %s 'resource "x" "y" {
  image = "repo@sha256:abc"
  provenance = true
  scan = "trivy"
}
' > green.tf
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-conventions.sh --tool terraform --iac green.tf --ruleset $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-conventions/eo-security.yaml --catalog /dev/null --eng-catalog /dev/null
